zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison於1297年出生在英國賀福爾阿培頓時，他的父親Sir William de Grandison I42歲，母親Lady Sibyl de Tregoz26歲。他於1330年6月20日之前與Blanche de Mortimer在英國賀福爾維格莫結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1358年8月10日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德賀福德 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison于1297年出生在英国賀福爾阿培頓时，他的父亲Sir William de Grandison I42岁，母亲Lady Sibyl de Tregoz26岁。他于1330年6月20日之前与Blanche de Mortimer在英国賀福爾維格莫结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1358年8月10日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德賀福德 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grandison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): said to be a habitational name from Granson on Lake Neuchâtel (Switzerland).

History: The first known bearer of this surname is Rigaldus de Grancione (flourished 1040). The name was taken to Britain by Otes de Grandison (died 1328) and his brother. They were among a group of Savoyards who settled in England when Henry III married a granddaughter of the Count of Savoy.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison was born in 1297, in Ashperton, Herefordshire, England, his father, Sir William de Grandison I, was 42 and his mother, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, was 26. He married Blanche de Mortimer before 20 June 1330, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 10 August 1358, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Hereford Cathedral, Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison est né en 1297, à Ashperton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Grandison I, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Blanche de Mortimer avant 20 juin 1330, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 10 août 1358, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Hereford Cathedral, Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison 1297 in Ashperton, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Grandison I 42 und seine Mutter Lady Sibyl de Tregoz 26. Er hat vor 20. Juni 1330 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England Blanche de Mortimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 10. August 1358 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Hereford Cathedral, Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Blanche de Mortimer prima del 20 giugno 1330, nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 agosto 1358, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Hereford Cathedral, Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandisonが1297年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアシュペルトンで生まれた時，父Sir William de Grandison Iは42歳，母Lady Sibyl de Tregozは26歳であった。1330年6月20日以前にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーでBlanche de Mortimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1358年8月10日に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードハーエフォード カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.Hereford Cathedral, Hereford, Herefordsh: 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드 허퍼드 캐테드럴
ko.lifeSummary: Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison(이)가 1297년 영국 허퍼드실르 애쉬퍼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Grandison I(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Sibyl de Tregoz(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1330년 6월 20일 이전 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 Blanche de Mortimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1358년 8월 10일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드 허퍼드 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison nasceu em 1297, em Ashperton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Grandison I, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Blanche de Mortimer antes 20 de junho de 1330, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1358, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Hereford Cathedral, Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Hereford Cathedral, Hereford, Herefordsh: хирефорд кэтедраль, хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison родился в 1297 г. в местности ашпиртон, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Grandison I было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Blanche de Mortimer перед 20 июнь 1330 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 10 августа 1358 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности хирефорд кэтедраль, хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter de Grandison 2nd Baron Grandison nació en 1297, en Ashperton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Grandison I, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Blanche de Mortimer antes de 20 de junio de 1330, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de agosto de 1358, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Hereford Cathedral, Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
